assertions.assertion: Warns against using in-memory stores in production
assertions.rationale: States 'you should not rely on AddInMemorySamlServiceProviders as it stores data only in memory'.

assertions.assertion: The store class has a FindByEntityIdAsync method that accepts a string entityId and CancellationToken
assertions.rationale: FindByEntityIdAsync only accepts string entityId — missing CancellationToken parameter.

assertions.assertion: Uses EF Core (DbContext) for data access
assertions.rationale: Uses SamlDbContext with DbSet and FirstOrDefaultAsync.
